price: Ako te neki višebožac zamoli za zaštitu, ti ga zaštiti da bi saslušao Allahove riječi, a potom ga otpremi na mjesto sigurno za njega. To je zato što su oni narod koji ne zna.
arabic: وَإِنۡ أَحَدٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ ٱسۡتَجَارَكَ فَأَجِرۡهُ حَتَّىٰ يَسۡمَعَ كَلَٰمَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ أَبۡلِغۡهُ مَأۡمَنَهُۥۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَوۡمٞ لَّا يَعۡلَمُونَ

version.title: Bosnian Translation - Muhammad Mihanovich
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into Bosnian by Muhammad Mihanovich, printed in 2013. some referred verses corrected by Supervision of Rowwad Translation Center. The original translation is available for suggestions, continuous evaluation, and development.

meta.transliteration: wa-in aḥadun mina al-mush'rikīna is'tajāraka fa-ajir'hu ḥattā yasmaʿa kalāma al-lahi thumma abligh'hu mamanahu dhālika bi-annahum qawmun lā yaʿlamūna
